title.en: Even with Ye Tian's strength, he couldn't last ...

content.en:
If you cut off the source sea from the flame area, there is still one area between them, and that is the Death Dark Domain.

The Dead Realm also has a strong Beast Level, and that area has an extremely terrifying corrosiveness.

Even with Ye Tian's strength, he couldn't last long.

Of course, if you find a creature in the Dead Realm and copy it, then you can survive in the Dead Realm.

"Hey, the corrosion of the Death Dark Realm has been reduced!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He had also come to the Death Dark Domain before, but he couldn't last long at all, and he was corrupted by the Death Dark Domain.

But now, this place can't corrode him at all.

In fact, the power of the flames in the flame area is also greatly reduced, but what he has copied is a fire snake, so he can't feel it.

Soon, Ye Tian figured it out.

"The reason why the environment of the forbidden area is so harsh is mainly caused by the seal, but over the long years, the races here have evolved and gradually adapted to the environment here, so the body can be immune to the damage caused by the environment. But outsiders are not immune, so they don't last long. "

"But now it's different, the seal has been broken a little, which has caused a kind of power in the underworld to dissipate a little, whether it is the Soul Splitting Red Light or the Flame Zone, or the Death Dark Domain in front of you, the damage to outsiders has been greatly reduced. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He felt that even a half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor could hold on here.

Therefore, he can withstand the damage of the Death Dark Domain.

This is a good thing for him, he can completely use the power of the Immeasurable Dao Domain to protect himself, so that he can slowly sneak here.

As a result, Ye Tian entered the Death Dark Domain as a fire snake.

Although the strength of the fire snake's replica body is much weaker, it can barely hold on.

He tried his best to restrain his breath and slowly search for life in the dark realm of death.

Due to the fact that the seal has been broken a little, many new lives have recently been born in the Dark Realm of Death, but many of them are too weak to be replicated.

However, in order to prevent danger, Ye Tian immediately annihilated the body of this fire snake after sensing life.

Subsequently, he copied a sevenfold ancestor-level Death Dark Realm life, and then entered the Death Dark Domain.

In this way, the risk of exposure is eliminated.

In this way, he can continue to look for other beings suitable for replication.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to find a Death Dark Domain creature whose strength was comparable to that of the late stage of the Eightfold Ancestor, the Death Dark Ape.

Subsequently, Ye Tian copied the Death Dark Ape.

He was not in a hurry to cut off the source sea, he was going to spend a while in the death dark domain first, looking for some resources, and then go to cut off the source sea.

"Black Thorn Lotus!"

"Wuling Shadow Fruit!"

"Flowing black liquor!"

Ye Tian gradually found a lot of good things, and most of these things can be used to improve the will, and even have an effect on the immeasurable will.

Although Ye Tian had condensed his immeasurable will, his immeasurable will was very weak and weak.

According to the division of the immeasurable will of the Nine Floors, the lowest is the immeasurable will of one scale, and his immeasurable will has only reached the level of 1.5 scales.

And the immeasurable will of the Ninefold Ancestor can reach more than 3 at the weakest, and after practicing for a period of time, the immeasurable will of the Ninefold Ancestor can reach more than 10 scales.

The stronger the immeasurable will, the more powerful the immeasurable dao domain is.

Seeing that the Death Dark Domain could enhance the immeasurable will with so many resources, Ye Tian was ready to stay here for a while longer.

In this way, Ye Tian used all kinds of resources in the Death Dark Domain to enhance his immeasurable will.

Gradually, Ye Tian's immeasurable will began to begin.

1.6 scales!

1.8 scales!

2 scales!

3 scales!

Ye Tian's immeasurable will is getting stronger and stronger, the immeasurable Dao domain is getting stronger and stronger, and the strength is also becoming more and more terrifying!

However, soon, there will be avatar-level powerhouses in the Death Dark Domain to collect these resources, and it may not be worth it to strengthen the substance-level, but ordinary avatar-level creatures will collect these resources and trade with cultivators.

"Resources that can enhance immeasurable will are relatively difficult to collect, and even many places rich in these resources are occupied by those avatar-level creatures, so it's impossible for me to go to their territory to collect resources!"

Ye Tian thought helplessly.

So, he prepared to go to cut off the source sea immediately.

......

this day.

Ye Tian secretly crossed the Death Dark Domain with his human copy body with the copy body of the Death Dark Ape, but fortunately, those who were at the Enhancement Substance level did not peek at a small Eightfold Ancestor level Death Dark Ape.

As a result, Ye Tian successfully crossed the Death Dark Domain.

Then, he entered the Sea of Truncated Sources from the Dark Realm of Death.

As soon as he entered the Truncated Source Sea, layers of seals were blessed, and he couldn't sense the location of the Death Dark Domain.

At this moment, he was completely trapped in the Truncated Source Sea.

Of course, Ye Tian was not panicked at all, he came here to practice, as long as he could improve his strength.

"What a lot of energy!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

Although he was trapped in the Truncated Source Sea, even an ordinary Avatar-level or Ninefold Origin Ancestor couldn't rush out, but the energy here was indeed far beyond any treasure land he had ever seen before.

Cutting off the source sea seems to be a pure ocean liquefied by high-grade energy, and the suppression here is terrifying, even if Ye Tian's current strength is now, it will become very weak here.

But even if he absorbed these seawater energy to cultivate, he was much faster than the outside world.

"Start looking for resources!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, he dived to the bottom of the sea where the source sea was cut off.

He didn't have any information about the interception of the source sea, he only knew that this was a sealed place, an energy center, and the resources here were very rich, but it was difficult to get out when he entered here.

And there will also be danger here, and there is a high possibility of death.

Soon, Ye Tian found an incomparably precious resource on the bottom of the sea that cut off the source sea.

"What kind of resource is this?"

Ye Tian looked at the blue crystal in front of him, he couldn't recognize this kind of resource, it should be the unique resource that cut off the source sea.

Instantly, he grabbed a blue crystal and absorbed the energy inside!

Rumble!!!!

Terrifying energy poured into Ye Tian's body, frantically refining his body and improving his cultivation.

"It can be used to improve cultivation, and it can also temper the body, which has a certain effect of improving the level of life!"

Ye Tian said in surprise.
